title: Approve Symphonie UX/UI Architect Alpha.6 with recorded historical evidence limitation
approval_evidence: A. APPROVE_ALPHA6_WITH_RECORDED_EVIDENCE_LIMITATION. Documenta en el repo las pruebas necesarias.

decision.summary: Approve symphonie-ux-ui-architect 0.1.0-alpha.6 as the approved Phase 3A architect baseline while explicitly accepting the incomplete retained historical evidence for REG-02 through REG-07.

accepted_limitation.interpretation: The evidence gap does not invalidate the direct Alpha.6 REG-08 and REG-09 results and does not block baseline approval. It prevents any claim that the entire historical pack was revalidated in the same execution.

rules: Alpha.6 becomes the approved Phase 3A architect baseline for future separately authorized use.
Alpha.5 remains a closed immutable historical baseline and must not be modified or silently deleted.
The conditional migration-handoff.json extension is used only when an authorized instruction activates an applicable migration or fidelity condition.
The evidence limitation for REG-02 through REG-07 must remain visible until separately verified or formally closed.
Promotion approval does not authorize merge, release, installation, Symphonie integration, real-design execution, repeatability testing, MammothSkills migration, deployment, or product changes.
Any future historical-evidence execution must use the bounded plan recorded in projects/symphonie/reports/ALPHA6_HISTORICAL_EVIDENCE_TEST_PLAN.md.
